merchant.body: Ukuthengisa okulula kubarekisi base-Mzansi. Abathengi babuka futhi bathenge bengaphumi ku-WhatsApp.
merchant.sub: Isekwe i-Stitch · Isimemo kuphela · Kusuka ku-R199/iny

customer.body: Thola abarekisi base-Mzansi futhi ubathenga ngqo ku-WhatsApp. Akukho okudinga ukudownloada, akukho akhawunti — cindezela nje uthenga.
customer.sub: Ukuphuma okuphephile · Stitch · Isebenza kuwo wonke umakhalekhukhwini

HowItWorks.heading: Kusimemo kuya ekuthengiseni kokuqala
HowItWorks.subtext: Ukuqeqeshwa kwakhiwe ukuze abarekisi abangazange bathengise ku-inthanethi bakwazi ukusebenza ngaphambi kwalunche.
HowItWorks.ctaSub: Izindawo ezilinganiselwe zabarekisi ziyatholakala ekwethulweni kwethu kwesimemo.

steps.title: Faka isicelo sesimemo
steps.body: I-Omeru inikwa ngesimemo kuphela. Faka isicelo nge-imeyili noma ku-WhatsApp. Sibuyekeza ibhizinisi lakho futhi sikhubaze akhawunti yakho ngaphakathi kwamahora angu-24.

steps.title: Misa isitolo sakho se-WhatsApp
steps.body: Engeza imikhiqizo, misa amanani, lungisa i-Stitch ye-EFT esheshayo. Isitolo sakho sihlala ngaphakathi kwe-WhatsApp — akudingeki i-app noma iwebhusayithi.

steps.title: Yabelana ngesixhumanisi sesitolo sakho
steps.body: Thumela abathengi isixhumanisi se-WhatsApp. Babuka, babheke futhi bakhokhe bengaphumi engxoxweni. Uthole izaziso zemiyalelo ngokushesha.

steps.title: Tholakala ukukhokhelwa, ukukhula
steps.body: I-Stitch ilungisa izinkokhelo ngqo ebhange lakho. Thumela ama-promo, buka ukuhlaziywa, futhi wande phakathi kwezindawo eziningi.

Features.heading:
Konke umurekisi
akudingayo ngempela.
Features.subtext: Akukho okungemfaneleko. Amathuluzi kuphela ashintsha izingxoxo ze-WhatsApp abe imali.

items.title: Ulwazi lwe-WhatsApp lwemvelo
items.body: Abathengi abaphumi ku-WhatsApp. Buka, faka ekadineni, khetha — konke ku-app abachithe kuyo amahora nsuku zonke.

items.title: I-Stitch ye-EFT esheshayo
items.body: I-EFT esheshayo esekwe i-Stitch. Abathengi bakhokha kusuka ku-app yabo yebhange — akudingeki ikhadi. Imali ifika ngqo akhawuntini yakho.

items.title: Ukuhlaziywa kwe-isikhathi sangempela
items.body: Landela ukuthengiswa, imikhiqizo ephezulu, nokuphatha kwabathengi. Yazi okuthengwayo ngaphambi kokuba kuphelele.

items.title: Ukusabalalisa kwe-WhatsApp
items.body: Thumela ama-promo nezaziso zokuphinda ugcwalise kubathengi abavumile ukuzwa. Amazinga okubutha aphezulu kuneposi, izindleko ziphansi kuneSMS.

items.title: Ukusekela izindawo eziningi
items.body: Phatha izindawo ezifika kwezi-3 kusuka ku-dashboard eyodwa ye-Pro. Ukubika okuhlanganisiwe phakathi kwazo zonke izitolo zakho.

items.title: Izaziso zemiyalelo ngokushesha
items.body: Waziwa ngalo mzuzwana ioda linikelwa. Yamukela, nqaba, noma wazise abathengi — konke kusuka kumakhalekhukhwini wakho, ngesikhathi sangempela.

Testimonials.heading: Abarekisi bempela.
Testimonials.subtext: Abarekisi abafaka izicelo zokungena okokuqala futhi baphila ngaphakathi kwamahora angu-24.

items.quote: Ngangithengisa ipap nawo chakalaka ngeqembu elilodwa le-WhatsApp — akukho ukulandela imiyalelo, akukho izinkokhelo, inxushunxushu nje. I-Omeru ishintshile konke. Manje abathengi babuka, bakhethe, bakhokhe ngaphandle kokungishayela ucingo. Ngaya ku-R4k kuya ku-R18k ngenyanga ezizonke ku-zinyanga ezimbili.

Inkinga yami enkulu ngaphambi kwe-Omeru kwakungabantu ababeka imiyalelo, bese bengakhokhi. Ukuhlangana kweziinkokhelo kusho ukuthi bathola iqiniso lemiyalelo kuphela uma sebekhokha. Ukugeleza kwemali yami kubusuku nobukhanya uma kuqhathaniswa nangaphambili.

Angiyena umuntu wobuchwepheshe. Ngacabanga ukuthi 'isitolo se-inthanethi' kusho ukuthi ngidinga iwebhusayithi nomthuthukisi. I-Omeru yangikhokhelisa ngaphakathi kwamahhora amathathu futhi ngenza ukuthengiswa kwami kokuqala ngalosuku olufanayo. Abathengi bami abadinga ukwenza lutho olusha — sebenayo i-WhatsApp.

Sithengisela izindlu zokudlela nabapheki basekhaya. Isici sokusabalalisa ku-Growth siyamangalisa — sathumela umlayezo owodwa ngoxhaxha olumva lwe-chilli futhi sanikwa izincwadi ezingama-23 emizuzwini engu-40. Lokho kungcono kunalo naluphi uhlobo lokumaketha engike ngalwenza.

Pricing.heading: Khula ungene kuhlelo
Pricing.subtext: Amanani wonke ku-ZAR. Ikhomishini kuphela ekuthengiseni okuphumelelayo — i-Omeru iyahluma nawe uma uhluma.
Pricing.footerNote: Wonke amaplani afaka ukucwaninga kwe-Stitch ye-EFT esheshayo. Izinkokhelo zabarekisi ziya ngqo akhawuntini yakho ye-SA. Khulisa noma wehlisa noma nini.

tiers.name: Ukuqala
tiers.note: Umkhawulo wemikhiqizo emi-5 · khulisa uma ulungele

tiers.name: Ukukhula
tiers.description: Kubarekisi abalungele ukukhulisa uhlu lwemikhiqizo yabo.

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.description: Kubarekisi abasungulekile abakhula baya ezindaweni eziningi.

FAQ.heading: Imibuzo emihle ifanele izimpendulo ezithe thi.

items.a: Yebo — futhi sikuqonda ngokubuthaka, hhayi njengesithiyo. Sifaka abarekisi muntu ngamunye ukuze sikusize ngempela ukuze umise ngendlela efanele, uphendule imibuzo, futhi uqiniseke ukuthi ukuthengiswa kwakho kokuqala kuhamba kahle. Faka isicelo nge-imeyili noma ku-WhatsApp futhi uzozwa kithi ngaphakathi kwamahora angu-24.

items.q: Abathengi bami badinga ukudownloada noma yini?
items.a: Akukho lutho. Uma umthengi wakho enayo i-WhatsApp — futhi e-Mzansi, lokho cishe nguwo wonke umuntu — angakwazi ukuthenga esitolweni sakho manje. Akukho akhawunti yokwenza, akukho i-app yokufaka, akukho amagama esigqalo. Bacindezela isixhumanisi sakho futhi bangene. Lokho yiqiniso lonke.

Sisebenzisa i-Stitch yezinkokhelo ze-EFT ezivikelekile esheshayo. Abathengi bakhokha ngqo ku-app yabo yebhange — akudingeki imininingwane yekhadi. Uma inkokhelo iqinisekisiwe, imali ifika ngqo akhawuntini yakho ye-SA. Sikhipha ikhomishini yethu ngokuzenzakalelayo ukuze ungaze uyibalele.

items.q: Kwenzekani uma ngifika emkhawulweni wemikhiqizo emi-5 ku-Ukuqala?
items.a: Uzothola i-prompt ye-dashboard ukuze ukhulise. Umkhawulo wokuQala akuyijeziso — uklanywe ukuze ungakhokheli lokho ongakudinganga ngakalokhu. Uma usuneqhaza futhi ufuna ukukhulisa uhlu lwakho, ukukhulisa kuya ku-Ukukhula (imikhiqizo engu-15) noma i-Pro (okungalinganiswanga) kuthatha imizuzwini emibili.

Ngokuqinisekile. Ku-Ukukhula nase-Pro, ungathuma ukusabalalisa kwe-WhatsApp kubathengi abavumile ukuzwa kuwe. I-Ukukhula ikunika ukusabalalisa okungu-2 ngenyanga — kuhle kakhulu ikhespeciala yempelasonto noma isaziso sokuphinda ugcwalise. I-Pro ingalinganiswanga nesikhathi esimiselwe. Amazinga okubutha e-WhatsApp avame ukuba phezulu ngu-3× kuneposi.

Lwaklanywa kubarekisi abathengisa isikhathi, hhayi izinto nje — cabanga izinto ezifana nezinqumo zokunweba ikhanda, ukuletha ekhaya, izikhumbuzi zokubonisana, ukulungisa. Uhlelo lwezinsizakalo luvumela ukubheka nokukhokhela kwale into ngapha kwezikhiqizo zakho zomzimba, konke ngaphakathi kwesitolo esifanayo se-WhatsApp.

Uma umthengi evula isixhumanisi sesitolo sakho, babona uphawu lwakho — igama lakho, imikhiqizo yakho, amanani akho. Ihlebhulenye 'nge-Omeru' izobazisa nje ukuthi inhlangano isingatha ukuphuma okuphephile. Cabanga ngendlela obucabangela ngayo i-'Powered by Shopify' — yakha ukwethembana, hhayi ukudideka.

Footer.ctaSub: Faka isicelo sesimemo futhi uqale ukuthengisa ngeviki.

Storefront.readyToShopSub: Vula i-WhatsApp futhi uqale ingxoxo no-{name} manje.
Storefront.settingUp: {name} ulungisa uhlu lwakho lempahla. Xoxa nabo ku-WhatsApp ngesikhathi esifanayo!
Storefront.previewMode: IMODHI YOKUBUTHA — Lokhu kuyimbono evuliwe yesitolo sakho njengoba igcinwe njengamanje. Abathengi babona inguqulo ebucashiwe.

Stores.heroSub: Funda nge abarekisi abazimele futhi uthenga ngqo ku-WhatsApp — akukho ukudownloada, akukho akhawunti.

NotFound.heading: Ikhasi alitholakali
NotFound.body: Leli khasi alikhona. Uma ubheka isitolo, zama ukuphenyisisa abarekisi bonke.
